executives.name: Joseph R. Hinrichs
executives.background: President and Chief Executive Officer of CSX since September 2022. Previously served as President, Automotive at Ford Motor Company from 2019 to 2020.

executives.name: Sean R. Pelkey
executives.background: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since 2022. Previously served as Vice President and Treasurer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Michael J. Cory
executives.background: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer since September 2023. Former Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer of Canadian National Railway Company.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer

executives.name: Kevin S. Boone
executives.background: Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer since September 2023. Previously served as Executive Vice President of Sales and Marketing.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer

executives.name: Nathan D. Goldman
executives.background: Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary since 2017.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary

board_of_directors.name: John J. Zillmer
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of the Board of CSX. Chief Executive Officer of Aramark.

board_of_directors.name: Donna M. Abbott
board_of_directors.background: Former Vice President and Controller of Eastman Chemical Company.

board_of_directors.name: James M. Bernhard, Jr.
board_of_directors.background: Founder and Managing Partner of Bernhard Capital Partners.

board_of_directors.name: Stanislav J. Galiev
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of various logistics firms.
